REGISTER: mseccfg
NUMBER: 0x747
MODE: M-mode
WIDTH: 64
FIELDS: 63..34=IMPLEMENTATION_DEFINED, 33..32=PMM, 31..10=WPRI, 9..9=SSEED, 8..8=USEED, 7..3=WPRI, 2..2=RLB, 1..1=MMWP, 0..0=MML, UNKNOWN..UNKNOWN=MLPE
EXTENSIONS: Smepmp, Smmpm, Zicfilp, Zkr
RULE 1: If the Zkr extension is implemented, the mseccfg CSR MUST exist.
